product_information.product_name: Max Factor 2000 Calorie Mascara Waterproof Black

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: C11-12 ISOPARAFFIN, POLYETHYLENE, DISTEARDIMONIUM HECTORITE, COPERNICIA CERIFERA CERA/COPERNICIA CERIFERA (CARNAUBA) WAX/CIRE DE CARNAUBA, TRIHYDROXYSTEARIN, PROPYLENE CARBONATE, PENTAERYTHRITYL HYDROGENATED ROSINATE, GLYCERYL ROSINATE, PHENOXYETHANOL, PROPYLPARABEN, PANTHENOL, TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, SORBITOL, [MAY CONTAIN/PEUT CONTENIR/+/-: IRON OXIDES (CI 77491, CI 77492, CI 77499)].
